zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Rokeby於1383年出生在英國越可爾洛可比時，他的父親Ralph Rokeby21歲，母親Elizabeth Stapleton17歲。他於1400年與Anne De Eure在英國越可爾洛可比結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1422年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Rokeby于1383年出生在英国越可爾洛可比时，他的父亲Ralph Rokeby21岁，母亲Elizabeth Stapleton17岁。他于1400年与Anne De Eure在英国越可爾洛可比结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1422年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Rokeby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Roxby in Hinderwell (NR Yorks), recorded as Rozebi in 1086, or Roxby in Thornton Dale (NR Yorks), recorded as Rosebi in 1086.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Rokeby was born in 1383, in Rokeby, Yorkshire, England, his father, Ralph Rokeby, was 21 and his mother, Elizabeth Stapleton, was 17. He married Anne De Eure in 1400, in Rokeby, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died after 1422.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Rokeby est né en 1383, à Rokeby, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Rokeby, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Stapleton, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Anne De Eure en 1400, à Rokeby, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé après 1422.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Rokeby 1383 in Rokeby, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph Rokeby 21 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Stapleton 17. Er hat 1400 in Rokeby, Yorkshire, England Anne De Eure geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb nach 1422.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Rokeby è nato il nel 1383 nel Rokeby, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Ralph Rokeby, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Stapleton, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Anne De Eure nel 1400, nel Rokeby, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1422.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Rokebyが1383年にイギリスヨークシュアイアロケビーで生まれた時，父Ralph Rokebyは21歳，母Elizabeth Stapletonは17歳であった。1400年にイギリスヨークシュアイアロケビーでAnne De Eureと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1422年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Rokeby(이)가 1383년 영국 요르크실르 로케비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Rokeby(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Stapleton(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1400년 영국 요르크실르 로케비에서 Anne De Eure(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1422년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Rokeby nasceu em 1383, em Rokeby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Rokeby, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Stapleton, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne De Eure em 1400, em Rokeby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu após 1422.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Rokeby родился в 1383 г. в местности рокеби, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph Rokeby было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Stapleton, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne De Eure в 1400 г. в местности рокеби, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер после 1422 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Rokeby nació en 1383, en Rokeby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph Rokeby, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Stapleton, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Anne De Eure en 1400, en Rokeby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de 1422.
